items.headline: Trending Topics: Who will win the Game 7s this weekend?
items.description: With three first round series in the East headed to a decisive Game 7, who will advance in the NBA Playoffs? Our writers chime in.

items.headline: 7 numbers to know for Celtics-76ers Game 7
items.description: Boston's offense and Jayson Tatum vs. Joel Embiid could be big factors in determining which team advances to the conference semifinals.

items.headline: How Detroit escaped elimination in Orlando with a stunning comeback
items.description: The Pistons were facing elimination and down by 24 points, on the road, in the second half before storming back.

items.headline: Hawks' Dyson Daniels, Knicks' Mitchell Robinson fined for altercation
items.description: Both players escalated the altercation with Robinson continuing to aggressively pursue Daniels after the players had been separated.

items.headline: Raptors' Brandon Ingram out for Game 6 against Cavaliers with sore right heel
items.description: Raptors coach Darko Rajakovic said F Brandon Ingram will miss Game 6 against the Cavaliers because of a sore right heel.

items.headline: Recap: Lakers advance, Pistons, Raptors force Game 7s
items.description: Check out the best of Friday's 2026 NBA Playoffs action, featuring Pistons-Magic, Cavaliers-Raptors and Lakers-Rockets.

items.headline: The Athletic: Inside how Jalen Suggs channels his inner football player
items.description: The Magic guard was the first person to be named Minnesota Mr. Basketball and Mr. Football in the same year.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: LeBron James continues closeout success as Lakers move on to challenge OKC
items.description: The Lakers live by the 3, the Rockets are felled by bricks, and LeBron James sends yet another opponent home in Game 6.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Raptors race ahead, then force Game 7 on RJ Barrett's 3-pointer in final seconds
items.description: The 3-point balance tilts in Toronto's favor, Collin Murray-Boyles breaks out & more as the Raptors send the series back to Cleveland.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Pistons completely shut down Magic to force Game 7
items.description: The Pistons take a collective breath and then deliver repeatedly, Cade carries Detroit and more from a stunning Game 6 win.

items.headline: Facts to know about Game 7 matchups in NBA playoff history
items.description: Dive deep into the stats and facts to know about Game 7 history in the NBA playoffs.

items.headline: NBA announces 73 players invited to participate at AWS NBA Draft Combine 2026
items.description: The annual AWS NBA Draft Combine will take place May 10-17 at Wintrust Arena and the Marriott Marquis in Chicago

items.headline: NBA Playoffs: What to expect in Spurs-Wolves series
items.description: Standout big men mark this series as spry San Antonio and playoff-tested Minnesota meet in a matchup of deep West squads.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Pistons-Magic Game 6
items.description: Efficiency at the free throw line and Orlando's defense on Cade Cunningham are among the key factors to watch in Game 6.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Lakers-Rockets Game 6
items.description: Houston may have the formula to reach Game 7, but must thwart the Lakers' rebuttal (and LeBron James in a Game 6) to do so.
